reviews.review_description: Didn’t expect this to be this fun, got me sweating in minutes. Punches feel solid and movement is smooth, and at times it really feels like a real fight. I actually got tired after a few rounds lol. Would love more boxers with different styles to keep things fresh. Also some crowd reactions or emotions would make it feel more alive.

developer_response.body: Thank you for the wonderful feedback! We're thrilled to hear you're enjoying the gameplay and getting a great workout in the ring. Your suggestions are greatly appreciated and will help us improve future updates. If you're enjoying Real Boxing, we'd love your continued support and rating! 🥊

reviews.review_description: Game doesn’t have a menu. It just started right in a boxing match. Height configuration was messed up, no way to adjust in game. I couldn’t even exit the game! I crouched down to see how the gameplay was against my smaller ai opponent. The punching wasn’t registering both ways. This game should be free lol.

developer_response.body: Thank you for your feedback. We're sorry you encountered issues with calibration, controls, and exiting the game. We're working to improve the experience and appreciate you sharing these details with us.
